name: Zap
description: Zap is a water dragon Core Skylander who first appeared in Skylanders: Spyro's Adventure. He is a fast-paced fighter who combines water and electricity.
biography: Zap was born into the royal family of water dragons, but a riptide washed him to a distant sea, where he was raised by electric eels. Growing up, he excelled in everything and even created a special gold harness that allows him to carry an endless electrical charge and shock things at a great distance.
personality: Zap is a friendly and mischievous water dragon. He is a prankster who loves to shock his fellow Skylanders whenever he gets the chance. Naturally curious and competitive, he is a dedicated guardian of the seas.

story.content: Born into a royal family of water dragons, Zap was a show-off swimmer and mischief maker. One afternoon, a riptide sucked him out into the open ocean. He was found by electric eels who raised him as one of their own.
Zap built himself an electric harness to fit in with his eel family. His exploits as a champion swimmer eventually reached Master Eon, who recruited him to the Skylanders.

trivia: Zap is one of the dragon Skylanders who cannot fly in-game.
His voice sounds gurgly, as if he has water in his mouth.
The Series 2 Wow Pow 'For Riley' was named in memory of a young fan.
Despite being a water dragon, he lacks claws and resembles an amphibian.
gameplay: Zap focuses on speed and area denial. He can slide on Sea Slime to move quickly and leave a trail that slows enemies. His Lightning Breath can be upgraded to bounce off walls, and his Wave Rider ability allows him to wash away groups of enemies.

basic.name: Sea Slime Slide
basic.content: Zap slides on a trail of sea slime that enemies will become stuck in.

basic_upgrades.name: Electro-Slime
basic_upgrades.content: Sea Slime can be electrified by Zap's Lightning Breath.

basic_upgrades.name: Wave Rider
basic_upgrades.content: Zap can summon and ride a great wave that washes away enemies.

wow_pows.name: For Riley
wow_pows.content: While riding a wave, press Attack 2 to make a big splash.

abilities.name: Lightning Strikes Twice
abilities.content: Lightning Breath bounces off of enemies and walls.
